entry.title: New: RES25-086 (Honolulu) — Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.
entry.content:
INITIATING AMENDMENTS TO THE REVISED CHARTER OF THE CITY AND COUNTY OF HONOLULU 1973, (AMENDED 2017 EDITION), AS AMENDED PURSUANT TO THE MAYOR’S EXECUTIVE REORGANIZATION AUTHORITY, RELATING TO THE OFFICE OF HOUSING, DEPARTMENT OF COMMUNITY SERVICES, DEPARTMENT OF PLANNING AND PERMITTING, DEPARTMENT OF LAND MANAGEMENT, AND DEPARTMENT OF BUDGET AND FISCAL SERVICES.

Latest action: Referral from Committee direct to Council Floor.

View on the council site
